boundary: Numeric K900/P19/P20 action signals are bound for future Cube Register rendering. They are not rendered by this pass and are not physical-force claims.

compression.source_claim: odd carrier triangles localize the strongest half-flip return compression

cube_register_target.meaning: Interior may later show finite return-path compression; trace may later show registered aftermath.

compression.boundary: Compression means finite return-path metric compression, not physical gravity.

source_claims.statement: Within the exhaustive five-edge census, support conservation exactly selects the 1,231 threshold-preserving variants.
source_claims.boundary: Finite five-edge census only. Not a physical field law.

source_claims.domain: K900 is the exact residue-vector representative
source_claims.statement: K900 supplies the exact baseline residue vector; the five-edge support-preserving shell contains no exact residue-vector returns.
source_claims.boundary: Exact-return parity is established only through the scanned weights 0 through 6.

source_claims.domain: Even exact returns are paired cancellations
source_claims.statement: Every exact residue-vector return in the scanned range decomposes into opposite edge-delta pairs; no odd scanned weight returns exactly.

cube_register_target.meaning: Caps may later show residue polarity; side walls may later show support-preserving circulation.

polarity.boundary: Polarity means finite orientation/residue behavior, not physical electromagnetism.

source_claims.domain: Strong-like confined-composite marker is rigid under elementary triangle ablation
source_claims.statement: Every tested triangle-opening or triangle-deletion ablation breaks the exact strong-like confinement marker set.
source_claims.boundary: Strong-like is finite confinement grammar only, not QCD or physical strong force.

source_claims.claim: K900 has a clean confined-composite triangle signature.
source_claims.boundary: Exploratory strong-like grammar, not physical strong force.

source_claims.claim: K900 strong-like confinement markers are rigid under elementary triangle-opening ablations.
source_claims.boundary: Only elementary flip/delete triangle ablations were tested.

raw_signals.finite_signature: internal difference + neutral closure -> confined composite identity
raw_signals.interpretation: K900 has a clean confined-composite signature: its carrier edges partition into triangles, its triangle grammar is exactly five 111 and five 000, and no wound edge appears in a silent triangle.

cube_register_target.meaning: Seams may later show confined triangle/edge organization.

confinement.boundary: Confinement means finite triangle/edge organization, not physical strong force.

source_claims.domain: Weak-like channels are directed K900-to-target transformations
source_claims.statement: All 1,231 admissible support-preserving channels are oriented K900-to-target transformations with nonzero directed triangle-transition signature.
source_claims.boundary: Weak-like is finite directed transformation grammar only, not physical weak interaction.

source_claims.domain: Weak-like directed classes are not inverse-paired in the K900 source frame
source_claims.statement: No directed weak-like channel class has an exact inverse partner inside the same K900-to-target channel grammar.
source_claims.boundary: Toggle operations remain operationally reversible; the directed class grammar is not internally inverse-paired.

source_claims.domain: Weak-like directed family has one-sided finite handedness
source_claims.statement: All 21 directed weak-like classes and all 1,231 channels have positive finite handedness in the K900 source frame.
source_claims.boundary: Finite handedness is internal transition asymmetry only, not physical chirality.

source_claims.domain: Weak-like handedness organizes inverse-distance order more than compression strength
source_claims.statement: The handedness score has strong rank-order association with nearest-inverse distance but is not a strong compression predictor.
source_claims.boundary: Correlation probe only; does not establish a physical weak-force mechanism.

source_claims.claim: Weak-like channels can be oriented as directed K900 to target transformations.
source_claims.boundary: Directed finite triangle-transition grammar only, not physical weak interaction.

raw_signals.finite_signature: admissible channel crossing -> lawful identity change
raw_signals.interpretation: The five-edge threshold-preserving variants behave like admissible identity-changing channels: they preserve the active/silent threshold and no-expansion direction, but all of them break the exact K900 metric fingerprint.

cube_register_target.meaning: Relationship walls may later show directed K900-to-target channel crossing.

transformation.boundary: Transformation means finite directed channel crossing, not physical weak interaction.

registered_trace.source_claim: Every rendered future signal must carry source artifact id and sha256 from this binding packet.

cube_register_target.meaning: Trace means registered aftermath and audit linkage.

registered_trace.boundary: Trace is not measurement itself; it is a queryable registered aftermath/audit binding.

rendering_policy.next_step: Add a non-visual inspector or projection-event packet before using these signals in draw().
